name: ChecklistTask
description: Describes a task in a checklist.

fields.name: text_entities
fields.description: Special entities that appear in the task text

fields.name: completed_by_user
fields.description: User that completed the task; omitted if the task wasn't completed by a user

fields.name: completed_by_chat
fields.description: Chat that completed the task; omitted if the task wasn't completed by a chat

fields.name: completion_date
fields.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the task was completed; 0 if the task wasn't completed
